description: Routine wound dressing change, stable surgical wound, no signs of infection.

patient.name: Patricia D., 45F
patient.chief_complaint: Surgical dressing change requested for abdominal incision from cholecystectomy 8 days ago. Wound appears clean, dry, intact, no drainage, no erythema, no fever. Following post-op instructions but ran out of dressings.
patient.history: Recent cholecystectomy 8 days ago, otherwise healthy

rubric_notes: All vitals normal. Wound exam shows no signs of infection (no fever, no erythema, no drainage). Single brief task (dressing change + instruction). Per RUBRIC Rule 5: ESI 5 (no resources, just supplies + instruction). Could be ESI 4 if counted as one resource (wound supplies). Tests whether agent escalates anything-post-surgical inappropriately.
